overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2035 Term Treasury ETF (IBTQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE 2035 Maturity US Treasury index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds maturing between January and December 2035. The fund will terminate in December 2035 IBTQ was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
